Create an ipm_env object specifying climate drivers

Source: R/env_condition.R
env_condition.Rd

Create an ipm_env object specifying climate drivers

Usage

env_condition(MAT, MAP)

Arguments

MAT

Numeric scalar or function(t). Mean Annual Temperature in Celsius. Use a function for time-varying climate scenarios.

MAP

Numeric scalar or function(t). Mean Annual Precipitation in mm/year.

Value

An object of S3 class "ipm_env" with fields $MAT and $MAP (unscaled; internal scaling applied by engines).

Examples

env <- env_condition(MAT = 8, MAP = 1200)
print(env)
#> <ipm_env>  MAT=8.0°C  MAP=1200 mm/yr
